<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Event\Runtime; use PHPUnit\Runner\Version; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class PHPUnit { private string $versionId; private string $releaseSeries; public function __construct() { $this->versionId = Version::id(); $this->releaseSeries = Version::series(); } public function versionId(): string { return $this->versionId; } public function releaseSeries(): string { return $this->releaseSeries; } }
